creator: dh@bsd.ee
text:
Hi,

On 1.07.2012 1:12, Michael Scheidell wrote:
> There is no patch attached to this PR, only a debug dump.  I see nothing
> in there that indicates a fix for this issue.
>
> if you have questions about how to generate a patch, join and ask a
> question at freebsd-ports@ mailing list.
>


I'm sorry - I screwed up submitting the PR. Obviously the "patch file" 
is really just a crash info file, which in retrospect should have gone 
into description field.


>
> --
> Michael Scheidell, CTO
>  >*| * SECNAP Network Security Corporation
> d: +1.561.948.2259
> w: http://people.freebsd.org/~scheidell


--
Risto
